events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: this is a **fail**, **critical risk** — a lock without a tag (or vice versa) violates OSHA 1910.147(c)(5), which requires every energy isolating device to carry both a lock and a legible tag identifying the authorized employee. Work must stop, the device must be properly re-locked/tagged, and isolation must be re-verified by tryout before work continues.
